description: Architecture audit requires service location to be identified

detection.trigger: audit phase without service location in state
detection.message: Architecture audit requires Step 3: Identify service location before proceeding

prevention: Complete Step 3 in architecture audit and save to state file

description: Tests use vague assertions instead of specific value checks

detection.message: Use specific assertions: .toEqual(), .toBe(), .toMatchObject() with real values

detection.check: Test file lacks happy path, sad path, edge case, or error case
detection.message: Missing test paths - ensure all 4 paths are covered

prevention: Add tests for: happy path, sad path, edge case, error case
